Sandwich terns, surf and crab rescue 🦀

coquet
peer
sea
Launched a couple of hours before low tide, so we stuck to the ramp to avoid a muddy start. We had high hopes for puffins and dolphins… no dolphins this time, but we did…

sea
peer
south-shields
Storm Dave meant no big Easter adventures. However, we managed to get a little South Shields jolly in on Saturday morning before Storm Dave hit.

sea

sea

sea

sea

sea

Trearddur to Rhoscolyn and back

peer
anglesey
sea

tynemouth
sea
A quick after-work paddle, catching the last of the evening light.

tynemouth
sea

Sep 28, 2025

Seal pup and a sinking tractor

peer
tynemouth
sea
Nine paddlers out for a standard Saturday morning paddle. Very low tide getting on. There was a seal pup resting on the steps as we paddles around the pier. Big swell around…

peer
sea
tynemouth
A relaxed paddle to Whitley Bay and back with Paul, Sarah, Cath, Claire & Kev. We stopped at Cullercoats for a coffee & breakfast rolls.

coquet
leadership
sea
The seals were so good we had to go around twice.

Fatfield to Lambton Castle

peer
river-wear
leadership
Evening paddle with Keith to Lambton castle. We got on at the Fatfield slipway an hour before high tide. It was a spring tide so plenty of water.

Fidden to Bunessan

mull

sea

sea

sea
